title: Listening - Part 3
description: For each question, write the correct answer in the gap. Write one or two words or a number or a date or a time.
instructions: You will hear one person giving information. For questions 14–19, write the correct answer in the gap.
context: You will hear a teacher giving students information about a museum visit.
audio_script: Man: Hello, everyone. My name’s Paul, and I’m going to explain tomorrow’s visit to Riverside Museum. We’ll meet outside the school at nine fifteen, but the museum opens later than usual tomorrow, so our group ticket is for [14]nine forty-five[/14]. Please be on time, because the first talk starts soon after we arrive. When we get there, wait by the main [15]entrance[/15]. Don’t go through the shop, as that is where visitors leave the building, not where groups meet. You may take photos in most rooms, but the museum has asked us not to use [16]cameras[/16] in the old paintings area. Phones are fine in the modern design rooms. At lunchtime, we’ll sit in the [17]garden[/17] if the weather is good. If it rains, there is a room inside for school groups. In the afternoon, we’ll have a short trip on a [18]boat[/18] along the river, which is included in the price. Please bring a coat because it can be windy on the water. The total cost for the day is [19]seven[/19] pounds, and that includes the museum ticket and transport. Give the money to me before we leave tomorrow morning. During the visit, you will need to stay with your group teacher. The museum is busy on Fridays, and it is easy to lose people in the larger rooms. There will be time to look around by yourself near the end, but only on the first floor. If you want to buy postcards or small presents, do that quickly before we leave. Remember to bring a bottle of water, because the café is quite expensive.

questions.explanation: The speaker says the group ticket is for nine forty-five.
The speaker tells students to wait by the main entrance.
The museum has asked them not to use cameras in the old paintings area.
The speaker says they will sit in the garden at lunchtime if the weather is good.
The speaker says there will be a short trip on a boat.
The speaker says the total cost for the day is seven pounds.
